mapper.select: SELECT 'RCT_DTL' AS img_disp_type, os_type, img_size, img_url FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'RC_ATST_TR' AND img_disp_type = 'MAIN_SRT' AND os_TYPE IN ('ALL', #{osType}) LIMIT 1
SELECT img_disp_type, os_type, img_size, img_url FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'RX_PANNEL' AND img_disp_type = 'RCT_DTL' AND os_TYPE IN ('ALL', #{osType}) LIMIT 1
SELECT img_disp_type, os_type, img_size, img_url FROM tb_img_mang WHERE img_content_type = 'RX_PANNEL' AND img_disp_type = 'MAIN_TOP'
SELECT os_type, img_size size, img_url url, disp_sn FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'ALL' AND dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND img_disp_type = 'DEFAULT'
